name: Nobel Resources Corp.
description: Nobel Resources is a TSX Venture Exchange listed, Canadian headquartered exploration company primarily focused on unlocking copper exploration. The Company’s flagship asset, the Cuprita Project, is comprised of 1,000 hectares and is strategically located in the prolific Metallogenic Paleocene Porphyry Copper Belt of Chile, an area that contains nearby major porphyry deposits. Cuprita presents a rare opportunity in advancing a prospective copper exploration asset in a tier-1 jurisdiction, with the company holding an option to earn 100% ownership of the project.
